name: Operation Silent Reaper
author: arma3-builder
overview: Two-mission MARSOC raid on a hostile SAM site followed by a pilot recovery deep in Tanoa.

missions.title: Silent Antenna
missions.summary: Infiltrate the jungle, destroy the SAM antenna, exfiltrate before dawn.

missions.title: Recover Reaper One
missions.summary: A SOAR pilot punched out near a hostile village. Bring them back alive.
objectives: Defend the LZ until extract arrives
